claim_text: The U.S. Department of Commerce initiated administrative reviews of antidumping duty orders with January anniversary dates.
subject: Products subject to existing antidumping duty orders
certainty_rationale: The claim describes an official agency action published in the Federal Register, which is the formal government record of implemented administrative procedures and regulatory actions by federal agencies.

claim_text: The U.S. Department of Commerce initiated administrative reviews of countervailing duty orders with January anniversary dates.
subject: Products subject to existing countervailing duty orders
certainty_rationale: This is an official Federal Register document announcing the initiation of administrative reviews, which constitutes published agency action meeting the RULE_PUBLISHED threshold for administrative proceedings.
